description: Calculate the 2024 Viral Meningitis incidence rate per 100,000 population for Fulton, Gwinnett, Cobb, DeKalb, and Clayton counties using Epi Info 7. Utilize the 'Cases.csv' and 'Population.csv' datasets located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CountyAnalysis\RawData\'. Create a project at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CountyAnalysis\Analysis.prj' and export a final table containing County, Count, Pop2024, and IncidenceRate (calculated as (Count / Pop2024) * 100000) to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CountyAnalysis\FinalRates.csv'. Ensure all five specified counties are included in the final output, with those having zero cases recorded with an incidence rate of 0.
